svg.font-family: -apple-system, Segoe UI, Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif
svg.text: An example: the assistant applies the troubleshooting skill
My DV360 line item is not spending its budget.
I will walk the delivery triage in order, top down. A problem high in the list

g.text: 1. Status: is the line item, its insertion order, and the campaign active?
2. Budget and flight: are we inside the dates with budget left?
3. Bid and win rate: is the bid above the floor for the targeted inventory?
4. Targeting size: is the audience large enough after every layer?
5. Inventory or deal: is there matching supply, and is the deal live?
6. Creative: is an approved creative assigned and the right size?

svg.text: The bid is below the floor, so you lose every auction. The impression-loss report
Fix: raise the bid to clear the floor, or widen targeting. Change one lever, then
re-check. I will not change anything in the account without your go-ahead.
